title: Aurora, 61497, Janet, The Smed and the Smoos, Eco-friendly soft toy, Red
features: Based upon the best-selling children's book The Smed and the Smoos by author Julia Donaldson and Alex Scheffler
Adorable Janet Soft Toy from the story, perfect present for children.
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: From the best selling picture book duo, Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler, we bring you The Smeds and The Smoos! An intergalactic story of friendship and togetherness, The Smeds and The Smoos follows a young Smed called Janet, and a Smoo called Bill on their journey around space as they try to evade their warring families and live in peace together. Little do they know that the red Smeds and the blue Smoos are learning how to work together in search of their beloved family members, Janet and Bill. When they eventually find the happy pair deep in the Wurpular Wood, back on their home planet, Janet and Bill have a big surprise for them! This is an adorable Janet soft toy. Made using soft red material for her body, she has a cute green hair and yellow feet. Janet is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
